EvaluationFormId.description: The unique identifier for the evaluation form.

EvaluationFormArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the evaluation form resource.

DataSetId.description: The identifier of the dataset that was associated.

ResourceShareId.description: The Resource Access Manager share ID that is generated.

ResourceShareArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Resource Access Manager share.

AssociationId.description: The existing association identifier that uniquely identifies the resource type and storage config for the given instance ID.
The existing association identifier that uniquely identifies the resource type and storage config for the given instance ID.

Created.description: Information about associations that are successfully created: DataSetId, TargetAccountId, ResourceShareId, ResourceShareArn.

Errors.description: A list of errors for datasets that aren't successfully associated with the target account.

Deleted.description: An array of successfully disassociated dataset identifiers.

Errors.description: A list of errors for any datasets not successfully removed.

Files.description: List of attached files that were successfully retrieved.

Errors.description: List of errors of attached files that could not be retrieved.

SuccessfulRequestList.description: List of requests for which contact was successfully created.

FailedRequestList.description: List of requests for which contact creation failed.

PhoneNumberId.description: A unique identifier for the phone number.

PhoneNumberArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the phone number.

AgentStatusARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the agent status.

ContactId.description: The identifier of the contact in this instance of Amazon Connect.

ContactArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created contact.

ContactFlowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the flow.

FlowContentSha256.description: Indicates the checksum value of the latest published flow content.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the flow module.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the instance.

IntegrationAssociationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the association.

ParticipantCredentials.description: The token used by the chat participant to call CreateParticipantConnection. The participant token is valid for the lifetime of a chat participant.

ParticipantId.description: The identifier for a chat participant. The participantId for a chat participant is the same throughout the chat lifecycle.

ContinuedFromContactId.description: The contactId from which a persistent chat session is started. This field is populated only for persistent chat.

PromptARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the prompt.

QueueArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the queue.

QuickConnectARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the quick connect.

RoutingProfileArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the routing profile.

RuleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the rule.

SecurityProfileArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the security profile.

Id.description: The identifier of the task template resource.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the task template resource.

Id.description: The identifier of the traffic distribution group. This can be the ID or the ARN of the traffic distribution group.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the traffic distribution group.

UseCaseArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the use case.

UserArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user account.

HierarchyGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the hierarchy group.

View.description: A view resource object. Contains metadata and content necessary to render the view.

Id.description: The identifier of the replicated instance. You can find the instanceId in the ARN of the instance. The replicated instance has the same identifier as the instance it was replicated from.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the replicated instance.

InitialContactId.description: Identifier of chat contact used to handle integration event. This may be null if the integration event is not valid without an already existing chat contact.

NewChatCreated.description: Whether handling the integration event resulted in creating a new chat or acting on existing chat.

FileArn.description: The unique identifier of the attached file resource (ARN).

FileId.description: The unique identifier of the attached file resource.

CreationTime.description: The time of Creation of the file resource as an ISO timestamp. It's specified in ISO 8601 format: yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.SSSZ. For example, 2024-05-03T02:41:28.172Z.

FileStatus.description: The current status of the attached file.

CreatedBy.description: Represents the identity that created the file.

UploadUrlMetadata.description: The headers to be provided while uploading the file to the URL.

ParticipantId.description: The identifier for a chat participant. The participantId for a chat participant is the same throughout the chat lifecycle.

ParticipantToken.description: The token used by the chat participant to call CreateParticipantConnection. The participant token is valid for the lifetime of a chat participant.

ContinuedFromContactId.description: The contactId from which a persistent chat session is started. This field is populated only for persistent chats.

StreamingId.description: The identifier of the streaming configuration enabled.

Id.description: The identifier of the task template resource.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the task template resource.

ContactFlowId.description: The identifier of the flow that runs by default when a task is created by referencing this template.

SelfAssignFlowId.description: The ContactFlowId for the flow that will be run if this template is used to create a self-assigned task.

Constraints.description: Constraints that are applicable to the fields listed.

Defaults.description: The default values for fields when a task is created by referencing this template.

Fields.description: Fields that are part of the template.

Status.description: Marks a template as ACTIVE or INACTIVE for a task to refer to it. Tasks can only be created from ACTIVE templates. If a template is marked as INACTIVE, then a task that refers to this template cannot be created.

LastModifiedTime.description: The timestamp when the task template was last modified.

CreatedTime.description: The timestamp when the task template was created.

View.description: A view resource object. Contains metadata and content necessary to render the view.
